productDisplayName: Latin Quarters Women Blue & Black Tops
description: Style Note This blue and black top, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this cute top. Style this with your favourite jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. Product Details Blue and black printed top that has a V-neckline with a short buttoned placket, short puffed sleeves, elasticated cuffs with tie-ups and a slightly curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Line dry Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
